title: Gateway: compact CoT to XML expansion
description: Expand compact binary CoT to full CoT XML for ATAK interop. PLI to <event><point><detail> structure, chat to GeoChat, team bytes to __group. Software-only: pure transformation, test with vectors.
close_reason: Implemented compact_cot.py gateway with decode_compact_cot() and expand_cot_to_xml(). 39 tests passing.
